item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Jain Resource Recycling Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price of Rs 464.80 on 27 Mar 2026, marking a notable achievement in the company’s market journey within the Non-Ferrous Metals sector. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: A 25.9% Year-to-Date Decline Pushes Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd to Its Weakest Level Ever
item.description: The stock of Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd has plunged to an all-time low, closing near ₹733.50 on 27 Mar 2026, marking a steep 25.85% decline over the past year and underperforming the Sensex by over 20 percentage points. This persistent downward trajectory has extended through multiple time frames, raising questions about the underlying factors driving such sustained weakness. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd Extends Losing Streak to New All-Time Low
item.description: The stock of Aptus Value Housing Finance India Ltd has plunged to an all-time low, closing near its 52-week trough at Rs 197.95 on 27 Mar 2026. This marks a continuation of a steep decline that has seen the share price fall by over 33% in the past year, significantly underperforming the broader market indices. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Bal Pharma Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 64 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the fifth consecutive session, Bal Pharma Ltd closed lower, slipping to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 64 on 27 Mar 2026. This decline comes amid a broader market downturn, but the stock’s underperformance remains pronounced compared to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rise, But Gopal Snacks Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Gopal Snacks Ltd’s share price plunged to an all-time low of Rs.253.65 on 27 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s ongoing decline. The company’s shares underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting persistent challenges in financial performance and valuation pressures. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: A 33.6% Three-Month Slide Pushes Cyient DLM Ltd to Record Low
item.description: The pace of decline in Cyient DLM Ltd has intensified over the past quarter, culminating in the stock touching an all-time low near Rs 280 on 27 Mar 2026. This marks a significant departure from broader market trends and highlights the challenges facing this industrial manufacturing player. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rise, But Heranba Industries Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Heranba Industries Ltd’s share price plunged to an all-time low of ₹167.10 on 27 March 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended period of decline. The micro-cap company, operating in the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, recorded a sharp day loss of 6.15%, underperforming both its sector and the broader Sensex index. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Dental Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 27 Mar 2026
item.description: Laxmi Dental Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 27 Mar 2026, touching a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.162 as the stock faced pronounced selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 27 Mar 2026
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a large-cap player in the E-Retail/ E-Commerce sector, experienced a notable intraday decline on 27 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 232.5, down 4% from its previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting immediate selling pressure amid a sharply falling Sensex and bearish technical indicators. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd (IRFC) experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 91.9, reflecting a 3.47% drop from its previous close. The stock’s performance aligned with sector trends but underperformed the broader market, pressured by prevailing bearish sentiment and technical weaknesses. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Jio Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Jio Financial Services Ltd has witnessed a significant 16.25% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a 2.25% decline in the stock price, the surge in open interest alongside robust volume patterns suggests evolving directional bets amid a broader sector downturn. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Mankind Pharma Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Mankind Pharma Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened investor participation and potential shifts in market positioning. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by increased volumes and a sustained upward price trend over recent sessions. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Savita Oil Technologies Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Savita Oil Technologies Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 27 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 299, down 7.9% from the previous close. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market amid widespread selling pressure and bearish technical indicators. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Delhivery Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Delhivery Ltd, a key player in the Transport Services sector, has witnessed a notable 16.0% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this spike, the stock faced a mild decline of 0.92% on 27 Mar 2026, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Market Volatility
item.description: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd, the parent company of NYKAA, has witnessed a significant 20.15% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this spike, the stock has experienced a modest decline of 2.19% today, reflecting a complex interplay between bullish bets and profit-taking amid broader sectoral and market pressures. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: One 97 Communications Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Market Downturn
item.description: One 97 Communications Ltd (PAYTM), a key player in the financial technology sector, witnessed a significant 19.15% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment on 27 Mar 2026, despite the stock underperforming the broader market and its sector. This sudden increase in open interest, coupled with declining prices and volume patterns, signals a complex shift in market positioning and investor sentiment that merits close examination. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Eternal Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Market Signals
item.description: Eternal Ltd, a large-cap player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, witnessed a notable 11.09% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 27 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning amid a backdrop of recent price weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a notable 11.7% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay between bullish bets and profit-taking pressures. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Weak Price Action
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd witnessed a significant 15.4% rise in open interest in its derivatives segment on 27 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low of Rs 698.35. This surge in open interest, coupled with a notable volume pattern and deteriorating price trends, suggests a complex repositioning by investors amid broader sectoral weakness. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Kalyan Jewellers Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Kalyan Jewellers India Ltd has witnessed a notable 11.5% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a slight dip in the stock price, the surge in open interest alongside rising volumes suggests evolving directional bets and increased participation in the gems and jewellery sector. Time: 19 minutes ago
